source.description: One reviewed six-panel marker contact sheet cropped into five process masters and a final treasure-chest master.
source.notes: Keep the same face-free three-quarter chest, domed lid, plank bands, central lock plate, feet, and loose coin cluster in each panel.

process_strategy: One handmade marker sheet builds a face-free chest from its low box through the domed lid, bands, lock, and already-established coin cluster, leaving only outline confidence and bright fill cleanup for the final.

final_elements.name: chest base
final_elements.description: A low three-quarter rectangular box with a slightly wider front edge.

final_elements.name: domed lid
final_elements.description: A rounded lid sitting directly on the established chest base.

final_elements.name: front plank bands
final_elements.description: Three loose vertical front bands and a thin lower rim.

final_elements.name: lock plate and side hinges
final_elements.description: A central rounded lock plate with two small hinges at the lid seam.

final_elements.name: feet and coin cluster
final_elements.description: Two squat corner feet and a few round coin shapes already peeking beside the base.

final_elements.name: orange wood, gold hardware, and blue shadow
final_elements.description: Marker fill laid over existing chest, hardware, coin, and ground shapes.

frames.visible_job: Draw a light low box with a wide front plane.
Add a domed lid directly on top of the established base.
Add three front plank bands and a narrow lower rim to the existing base.
Place the central lock plate and two small lid hinges on already established seams.
Add the chest feet and a few coin circles, then fill the established shapes with orange wood, gold hardware, and a small blue ground shadow.
introduces: orange wood, gold hardware, and blue shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthen existing black outlines, clean existing orange, gold, and blue marker fills, and add small highlights to already-present hardware and coins.

rejection_checks: Reject if the chest perspective, lid, bands, lock, or coin cluster changes between panels.
Reject if color appears on a chest part or coin that was not already visible in an earlier panel.
Reject clean vector-icon edges, polished poster rendering, words, labels, faces, or decorative borders.
